creator: miwi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

Build fails under 64bit 

- HAVE_GUI = 0 - WII = 0 - LUA_LIBS = (null) - HAVE_LIB_LUA = (null) - 
MAEMO = 0 - VALA = 1 - JAVA = 0 - USBSNF = 1 - SYSPROXY = 0 - DEBUGGER 
= 1 - HAVE_LIB_EWF = 0 - HAVE_LIB_READLINE = 1 
===>  Building for radare-1.5.2 cd src && gmake all gmake[1]: Entering

-pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -I../arch/ -I ../include -I/usr/local/include
